# mustache_template example

This directory contains example code demonstrating how to use the
`mustache_template` package.

## Running the example

```bash
cd third_party/packages/mustache_template/example
dart pub get
dart run lib/main.dart
```

## Topics covered

- Basic variable substitution
- Sections (truthy and falsy values)
- List rendering with nested objects
- Inverted sections
- HTML escaping and triple mustache
- Comments
- Partial templates
- Lambda functions
- Lenient vs. strict mode
